title: PolicyGPT Question-Set Draft (UW Crawler -> Coordinator)
description: Output of the rater's UW question-collection crawler: a DRAFT question set for a line+profession, harvested from a carrier portal. Always requires human/AI normalization before it becomes a live question set (architecture plan section 3.2). Single source of truth; vendored, not hand-copied.

source_carrier.description: carrier key the questions were harvested from

needs_review.description: Drafts are ALWAYS reviewed (human or AI) before going live.

prompt.description: the question text as shown on the carrier site

answer_type.description: Canonical answer-type vocabulary shared by the rater crawler (ANSWER_TYPES in src/automation/question-crawler.js), the coordinator's PENDING_CARRIER_ANSWER_TYPES, and the plugin card TYPE_MAP. Keeps all legacy values and extends them with the full rater set. Single source of truth (architecture plan section 3.2).

options.description: ALL option values for single_select/multi_select/radio/checkbox (label + value).

validation.description: min/max/pattern etc. inferred from the field

source_selector.description: the carrier-site selector this was read from (seeds the carrier module's field map)

screenshot.description: GCS pointer to a screenshot of this question for review

confidence.description: 0-1, how confident the crawler/AI is in this classification

needs_new_component.description: TRUE if this question's answer_type has no matching quick-answer card component yet — flags exactly which new components to request from Claude Design. The agents must NOT invent a card.
